strategy: Founder/CEO/operator-focused audience aligned to current product building, validation, shipping, customer pain, SaaS execution, and business-building. De-emphasize OpenClaw-specific and generic AI-builder chatter.

founder_ceo_operator.why: Founder/operator perspective with product and business-building relevance.
Founder, product, audience, and business model conversations.
Shipping cadence, focus, and operator-style business building.
Founder execution, positioning, and business-building commentary.
Operator/founder takes on AI-native business models and software execution.

saas_execution_validation.why: Distribution, growth, SEO, and SaaS execution-adjacent discussion.
Founder/startup ops, tactical growth, and execution-minded content.
Indie hacker / SaaS founder content with practical builder relevance.
SaaS founder perspective where useful, but secondary to operator/founder themes.

customer_pain_distribution.why: Audience, market, and founder distribution insight.
Product, user value, and operator thinking.
Practical takes on what is worth building and shipping.
